dataset.format: Zarr v3 arrays with little-endian bytes and zstd compression
dataset.label_status: Pilot candidate selected from explicit forced-VDE programme metadata; not yet a machine-readable spontaneous-disruption label and not suitable alone for population claims.

selection_evidence.programme_objective: Produce forced VDE discharges and measure lower-divertor heat flux.
selection_evidence.shot_preshot_comment: Load SND Ohmic. Force VDE, ZTEST to zero at 250m.

license.attribution: UKAEA FAIR MAST / MAST Data Catalog; shot 27707.
license.name: Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0 International
license.statement_scope: Except where otherwise noted, data hosted in the archive, metadata database, and catalog site are CC BY-SA 4.0.

limitations: This is one deliberately forced VDE shot, not a balanced disruption/non-disruption cohort.
MAST signal conventions must be mapped explicitly before feeding the DIII-D-shaped predictor.
Negative control shots and independently verified event times remain required for evaluation.
Raw Zarr objects are intentionally untracked pending owner selection; this manifest is tracked.

recon_candidates.format: per-shot HDF5; J-TEXT public example exposes 53 files / 193262560 bytes
recon_candidates.name: ITU/Zindi Multi-Machine Disruption Prediction Challenge
recon_candidates.reason: Competition rules state the data are the sole property of Zindi/host and prohibit transmission, duplication, publication, or redistribution outside participants.
recon_candidates.signals: 1 kHz plasma current, toroidal field, displacement, density, radiation, loop voltage, AXUV/SXR, locked-mode and derived proxies; 5 kHz Mirnov probes.

recon_candidates.format: MAT/HDF5-derived ZIP figure data; 14 files / 539644682 bytes
recon_candidates.name: Hybrid deep learning architecture for general disruption prediction across tokamaks
recon_candidates.reason: Harvard Dataverse version 2 declares no use information and directs users to contact the dataset contacts before use.

recon_candidates.name: Risk-Aware C-Mod and DIII-D Survival Analysis plot data
recon_candidates.reason: Contains derived ROC, warning-time, bootstrap, and RMST arrays rather than raw diagnostic time series; unsuitable for predictor onboarding.

recon_candidates.name: Event-AHU OpenFusion EAST multimodal disruption release
recon_candidates.reason: The public subtree currently contains only a framework figure and empty README sections.

reproduction.integrity_rule: Each local object must match files[].size_bytes and files[].sha256. Sort files[] by path, encode each record as UTF-8 sha256:size_bytes:path followed by LF, concatenate the records, and SHA-256 the result; it must equal download_manifest_sha256.
